quality.rationale: 结合无外力自由运动条件与角动量张量性质，通过乘积求导法则完成相对论自旋四矢量守恒性的多步证明

origin.question: Problem 11.2. Show(c) the spin 4-vector defined by$$\mathbf {S}_{\alpha} \equiv - \frac {1}{2} \varepsilon_{\alpha \beta \gamma \delta} \mathbf {J}^{\beta \gamma} \mathbf {u}^{\delta}$$is both conserved and
origin.solution: (c) Consider the time derivative of the spin:$$\frac {\mathrm {d S}_{\alpha}}{\mathrm {d t}} = - \frac {1}{2} \varepsilon_{\alpha} \beta \gamma \delta \left(\frac {\mathrm {d J}^{\beta \gamma}}{\mathrm {d t}} \mathrm {u}^{\delta} + \mathrm {J}^{\beta \gamma} \frac {\mathrm {d u}^{\delta}}{\mathrm {d t}}\right).The first term on the right vanishes from part (a). The second term vanishes because the system has no forces acting on it $(\mathrm{du}^{\delta} / \mathrm{dt} = 0)$ . Thus $\mathrm{dS}^{\alpha} / \mathrm{dt} = 0$ .
